items.description: Array of items to display. Each item has { value: any, label: any, disabled?: boolean, icon?: IconComponent | ReactElement }

value.description: Selected value(s). Single value for single selection, array of values for multiple selection

onChange.description: Callback fired when selection changes. Receives ComponentEvent with the new value

multiple.description: Enable multiple selection mode. When true, value should be an array

required.description: Mark the field as required (affects hidden input)

direction.description: Layout direction of the button group

disabled.description: Disable all buttons in the group

className.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

name.description: Name attribute for the hidden input field (useful for form submissions)
